title: SourceReference
description: A traceable pointer from generated content back to an approved source and blueprint node. Excerpts must be short paraphrases, never long verbatim copies of copyrighted text.

source_id.description: ID from source_manifest / source_index (e.g. 'SRC-058'), the blueprint, or a reference-text key.

locator.description: In-source locator: heading/section name, node number, or citation marker. No page numbers required.

supports.description: Short paraphrase (in our own words) of exactly what this source supports. NOT a verbatim quote.

confidence.description: Directness/richness of support in the cited source.
